description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21, update build configurations (Maven/Gradle), and ensure compatibility with Java 21 language features and APIs
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Java from 8 to 21. Updated pom.xml build configuration and modernized Java idioms using OpenRewrite recipes. Build passed and unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest stable)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace, update Spring dependencies, and adapt to Spring Boot 3.x configuration changes
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Updated pom.xml, migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespace, upgraded Oracle JDBC and H2 dependencies. Build passed and unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all project dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, resolve any dependency conflicts, and ensure security vulnerabilities are addressed
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully addressed security vulnerabilities. Fixed CVE-2024-47554 (HIGH) by upgrading commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.18.0. All other Spring Boot BOM-managed dependencies were already at latest compatible versions. Build passed and unit tests passed.
